# Battleship Fleet Command — Baseline Profile
# Section 18 — Performance & App Size
#
# This file is the STATIC baseline profile for app startup optimisation.
# It is consumed by the Android Gradle Plugin at build time to produce a
# binary profile that the ART compiler uses for AOT compilation of hot paths.
#
# Generated by BattleshipBaselineProfileGenerator (see :benchmark module).
# Journey 1: App launch → SplashScreen → MainMenuScreen (cold start < 500ms target)
# Journey 2: MainMenuScreen → ModeSelectScreen → DifficultyScreen → ShipPlacementScreen
# Journey 3: ShipPlacementScreen → BattleScreen (ship placement + confirm)
# Journey 4: BattleScreen turn loop (fire shot → animation → AI shot)
#
# Rebuild via:  ./gradlew :benchmark:generateBaselineProfile
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── Application startup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/BattleshipApplication;->onCreate()V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/MainActivity;->onCreate(Landroid/os/Bundle;)V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/MainActivity;->onResume()V

# ── Hilt / Dagger ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLdagger/hilt/android/internal/lifecycle/HiltViewModelFactory;-><init>(Landroid/content/Context;Landroid/os/Bundle;Landroidx/lifecycle/ViewModelProvider$Factory;Ldagger/hilt/android/internal/lifecycle/HiltViewModelFactory$ViewModelFactoriesEntryPoint;)V
HSPLdagger/hilt/android/internal/managers/ActivityComponentManager;-><init>(Landroid/app/Activity;)V

# ── Compose runtime ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLandroidx/compose/runtime/CompositionKt;->getCurrentComposerSkipping()Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;
HSPLandroidx/compose/ui/platform/AndroidComposeView;->onMeasure(II)V
HSPLandroidx/compose/ui/platform/AndroidComposeView;->draw(Landroid/graphics/Canvas;)V
HSPLandroidx/compose/foundation/lazy/grid/LazyGridKt;->LazyVerticalGrid(Landroidx/compose/foundation/lazy/grid/GridCells;Landroidx/compose/ui/Modifier;Landroidx/compose/foundation/lazy/grid/LazyGridState;Landroidx/compose/foundation/layout/PaddingValues;ZZZLandroidx/compose/foundation/lazy/grid/LazyGridScope;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;II)V

# ── Navigation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLandroidx/navigation/compose/NavHostKt;->NavHost(Landroidx/navigation/NavHostController;Landroid/os/Bundle;Landroidx/compose/ui/Modifier;Landroidx/compose/animation/EnterTransition;Landroidx/compose/animation/ExitTransition;Landroidx/compose/animation/EnterTransition;Landroidx/compose/animation/ExitTransition;Lkotlin/jvm/functions/Function1;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;II)V

# ── Feature: menu ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/menu/MainMenuScreen;->invoke(Landroidx/navigation/NavController;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;I)V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/menu/MenuViewModel;-><init>(Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/repository/StatsRepository;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/games/PlayGamesManager;)V

# ── Feature: setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/setup/ShipPlacementScreen;->invoke(Landroidx/navigation/NavController;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/setup/PlacementViewModel;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/navigation/ShipPlacementRoute;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;I)V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/setup/PlacementViewModel;-><init>(Landroidx/lifecycle/SavedStateHandle;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/repository/GameRepository;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/haptic/HapticManager;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/sound/SoundManager;)V

# ── Feature: game ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/game/battle/BattleScreen;->invoke(Landroidx/navigation/NavController;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/game/battle/BattleViewModel;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/navigation/BattleRoute;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;I)V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/feature/game/battle/BattleViewModel;-><init>(Landroidx/lifecycle/SavedStateHandle;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/repository/GameRepository;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/engine/GameEngine;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/sound/SoundManager;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/haptic/HapticManager;)V

# ── Core: ui components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/components/GameGridKt;->GameGrid(Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/model/BoardViewState;ZLkotlin/jvm/functions/Function1;Landroidx/compose/ui/Modifier;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;II)V
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/components/GameCellKt;->GameCell(Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/ui/model/CellViewState;Landroidx/compose/ui/unit/Dp;ZLkotlin/jvm/functions/Function0;Landroidx/compose/ui/Modifier;Landroidx/compose/runtime/Composer;II)V

# ── Core: domain ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/engine/GameEngine;->fireShot(Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/Coord;Ljava/util/List;Ljava/util/Set;)Lkotlin/Result;
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/ship/PlacementValidator;->validate(Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/ship/ShipPlacement;Ljava/util/List;Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/domain/ship/AdjacencyMode;)Ljava/util/List;

# ── Core: data (Room startup) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/data/local/BattleshipDatabase;->getInstance(Landroid/content/Context;)Lcom/battleship/fleetcommand/core/data/local/BattleshipDatabase;
HSPLandroidx/room/RoomDatabase;->init(Landroidx/room/DatabaseConfiguration;)V

# ── Kotlinx coroutines ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HSPLkotlinx/coroutines/flow/StateFlowImpl;->collect(Lkotlinx/coroutines/flow/FlowCollector;Lkotlin/coroutines/Continuation;)Ljava/lang/Object;
HSPLkotlinx/coroutines/flow/SharedFlowImpl;->collect(Lkotlinx/coroutines/flow/FlowCollector;Lkotlin/coroutines/Continuation;)Ljava/lang/Object;
